seo.title: Garcia Carpentry | Expert Carpenter in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Garcia Carpentry offers professional carpentry services in Dallas, TX. Custom cabinets, trim work, deck building, and more. Free estimates. Call (214) 736-6976.

hero.headline: Custom Carpentry That Elevates Your Home
hero.subheadline: From intricate trim to custom built-ins, we bring precision and passion to every project.

featureSections.title: Transform Your Kitchen & Bath
featureSections.body: Our custom cabinets are built to your exact specifications, using premium hardwoods and modern techniques. We design, build, and install for a seamless fit.
bullets: Bespoke designs tailored to your space
Solid wood construction for lasting beauty

featureSections.title: Beautiful Decks & Pergolas

bullets: Built to code with permits handled
featureSections.cardBody: Create the perfect outdoor retreat with a durable, custom-built deck.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Every cut, joint, and finish is executed with precision honed over 15 years of experience.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Punctual
whyChooseUs.description: We show up on time, communicate clearly, and complete projects on schedule.

whyChooseUs.title: Custom Solutions
whyChooseUs.description: No cookie-cutter work. We design around your needs, style, and budget.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean & Respectful
whyChooseUs.description: We protect your home with dust barriers, daily cleanup, and a respectful crew.

testimonials.quote: Garcia Carpentry transformed our outdated kitchen with beautiful custom cabinets. The craftsmanship is outstanding, and they finished ahead of schedule.
testimonials.author: Maria L.

testimonials.quote: We hired them to build a deck and pergola. The team was professional, the work is solid, and our backyard is now our favorite place.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: They installed custom shelving and trim throughout our home. Every detail was perfect, and they left the place spotless.
testimonials.author: Angela R.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation estimate.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of carpentry services for homes and businesses in Dallas. Every project is handled with skill, care, and attention to detail.

services.title: Custom Cabinetry
services.shortDescription: Bespoke cabinets for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.
services.longDescription: Our custom cabinetry service delivers furniture-quality cabinets built to your exact dimensions and style preferences. From traditional to contemporary, we use premium materials and expert joinery.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your needs, take measurements, and review design options.

process.title: Design & Material Selection
process.description: We create detailed drawings and help you choose woods, stains, and hardware.

process.title: Build & Install
process.description: We craft your cabinets in our shop and install them with precision.

faqs.question: How long does custom cabinetry take?
faqs.answer: Typically 4-6 weeks from design approval to installation.

faqs.question: Do you offer free estimates?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide free, no-obligation estimates for all projects.

services.title: Deck & Pergola Building
services.shortDescription: Beautiful outdoor structures built to last.
services.longDescription: Enhance your outdoor living space with a custom deck or pergola. We design and build structures that complement your home and withstand Texas weather.

process.title: Site Evaluation
process.description: We assess your yard, check codes, and discuss design ideas.

process.title: Custom Design
process.description: We create a plan tailored to your space and budget.

process.title: Construction
process.description: Our crew builds your deck or pergola with quality materials and expert techniques.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits?
faqs.answer: Yes, we obtain all necessary permits for your project.

faqs.question: What materials do you recommend?
faqs.answer: We offer pressure-treated wood, cedar, and composite decking options.

services.title: Trim & Crown Molding
services.shortDescription: Elegant trim work that adds character.
services.longDescription: Add architectural detail to your home with custom trim, crown molding, baseboards, and wainscoting. Our precise installation creates seamless, beautiful transitions.

process.title: Measurement & Design
process.description: We measure rooms and recommend molding profiles.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: Choose from wood, MDF, or polyurethane.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We cut and install with meticulous attention to corners and joints.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can match most existing profiles and stain colors.

faqs.question: How long does trim installation take?
faqs.answer: Most rooms are completed in 1-3 days.

services.title: Custom Shelving & Built-ins
services.shortDescription: Functional and stylish built-in storage solutions.
services.longDescription: Maximize your space with custom shelving and built-ins. From home libraries to entertainment centers, we design and build storage that fits your lifestyle.

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We discuss your storage needs and measure the area.

process.title: Custom Fabrication
process.description: We build shelves and cabinets in our workshop.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install and finish the built-ins for a perfect fit.

faqs.question: Can you build around a fireplace or TV?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We design built-ins to accommodate electronics and focal points.

faqs.question: Do you offer floating shelves?
faqs.answer: Yes, we build and install floating shelves that appear seamless.

about.headline: Dallas's Premier Carpentry Team
about.mission: To provide exceptional craftsmanship and personalized service that transforms homes and exceeds expectations.
story: Garcia Carpentry was founded in 2008 by master carpenter Miguel Garcia, who brought over a decade of experience from high-end custom homes. Starting with a single truck and a commitment to quality, Miguel built a reputation for precision and reliability. Over the years, the team grew, but the core values remained: use the best materials, respect the client's home, and deliver on time.

Today, Garcia Carpentry serves homeowners across Dallas with a full range of carpentry services. We take pride in our work, from intricate crown molding to expansive decks. Every project is a partnership with our clients, ensuring the final result reflects their vision and our craftsmanship.

coreValues.title: Quality First
coreValues.description: We never cut corners. Every project uses top-tier materials and techniques.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home as our own, keeping worksites clean and safe.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.description: We stay current with design trends and building methods to offer the best solutions.

contact.headline: Let's Build Something Together
contact.subheadline: Contact us for a free estimate and consultation.
